headline: Wells Fargo resumes coverage of Netflix as streaming giant goes back to plan A
summary: Investing.com -- Wells Fargo has resumed coverage of Netflix at Equal Weight, arguing the company is returning “back to Plan A: invest for growth” following the collapse of its pursuit of Warner Bros. Discovery.

content.title: Wells Fargo resumes coverage of Netflix as streaming giant goes back to plan A

headline: Why The Wells Fargo (WFC) Investment Narrative Is Quietly Shifting Into 2026
summary: The latest analyst work on Wells Fargo nudges the fair value estimate from about US$101.65 to roughly US$101.35, a very small shift that still matters if you care about where the current share price sits versus modeled value. Street research around the name is split between optimism and caution, with some firms lifting targets and others trimming them, all while leaving core earnings views largely intact. As you read on, you will see how these subtle price target moves fit into the broader...

headline: How The Amazon.com (AMZN) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI, Cloud And Valuation Debates
summary: Amazon's fair value estimate has been nudged slightly lower, with the price target moving from US$281.46 to US$280.47 per share. Analysts are tying this small adjustment to fresh debates around AI driven cloud demand, advertising growth potential, and renewed caution on how sensitive valuations can be when discount rate assumptions move. Read on to see how these updated views are shaping the current narrative around Amazon and how you can track it over time. Analyst Price Targets don't always...
